description_long: This object depicts a stylized construction worker suspended in midair by two elongated, V-shaped supports attached to the upper body. The figure wears a yellow hard hat and a brown shirt, with gray pants and white footwear. The arms are not visible, as they are enveloped or merged into the stretched material that extends upward. The legs are bent at the knees, giving the impression of a dynamic or suspended pose. The facial features are simplified, and the overall form is abstract, with exaggerated proportions and a smooth, matte finish. The object appears to be made primarily of a solid, lightweight material, possibly plastic or resin, with painted surfaces.
description: A stylized construction worker figure with a yellow hard hat, brown shirt, and gray pants, suspended by two elongated supports. The pose is dynamic and abstract, with smooth, matte surfaces and simplified features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the construction worker's face, yellow hard hat, brown shirt, and both legs, with the V-shaped supports extending upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the curvature of the supports, and the bent legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the hard hat, the back of the shirt and pants, and the supports extending from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the figure's profile, the stretched supports, and the bent legs from the opposite side.
